message:
test(rchd): respect CARGO_TARGET_DIR in daemon lifecycle tests

The rchd_binary_path() helper now checks for CARGO_TARGET_DIR environment
variable before falling back to the default target/debug location.

This fixes test failures when using non-standard target directories, such
as when:
- Using a shared target directory across multiple projects
- Running builds with `--target-dir` flag
- Using cargo workspace overrides
- CI systems that redirect target directories

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
